title: Show Me What You Did
description: logs any changes made in your Minecraft directory and you can view them all in a gui in game
body: This mod monitors your Minecraft directory and logs file changes such as creations, modifications, and deletions. Easily view recent updates to configuration files, screenshots, saves, and more through an in-game GUI. Perfect for troubleshooting, debugging, or simply staying informed about what’s happening behind the scenes in your Minecraft folder.
